title: sql.executeBatch params
description: Parameters for the sql.executeBatch RPC method

commands.description: Array of SQL commands to execute sequentially. The static schema enforces only a coarse hard ceiling; the per-connection limit is the negotiated `max_batch_size` (default 32, may be lower).

sql.description: SQL statement to execute. Hard ceiling 1 MiB per command. Each command must contain exactly one top-level SQL statement.

params.description: Named parameters for the SQL statement. Current runtime supports up to 5 named parameters per command.

execution_order.description: Optional command execution order (ascending). Commands with execution_order are executed first; commands without it execute afterwards in original list order.

client_token.description: Opaque token (hex) or JWT for authorization. Required when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for request deduplication (TTL 5min). Reusing the same key with a different request payload is rejected.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum ODBC execution time in milliseconds. Effective timeout is the minimum between this value and any active internal stage budget.

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows per command

transaction.description: Whether to execute all commands in a single database transaction (begin/commit/rollback)

database.description: Optional target database override for this batch request
